torch_pattern: query = torch.reshape(input_tensor, (batch_size, sequence_size, {NUM_HEADS}, {HEAD_SIZE})); query = torch.permute(query, (0, 2, 1, 3)).contiguous(); split_tensors = kv_input_tensor.split(kv_input_tensor.shape[-1] // (2 * {NUM_KV_HEADS}), dim=-1); key = torch.concat(split_tensors[::2], dim=-1); value = torch.concat(split_tensors[1::2], dim=-1); key = torch.reshape(key, (batch_size, sequence_size, {NUM_KV_HEADS}, {HEAD_SIZE})); value = torch.reshape(value, (batch_size, sequence_size, {NUM_KV_HEADS}, {HEAD_SIZE})); key = torch.permute(key, (0, 2, 1, 3)).contiguous(); value = torch.permute(value, (0, 2, 1, 3)).contiguous(); key = torch.permute(key, (0, 1, 3, 2)).contiguous()  # if transpose_k_heads

config_template.transpose_k_heads: {TRANSPOSE_K:bool, true if downstream matmul expects K pre-transposed}

weight_transform: None (no weights). Upstream QKV projection weights must be arranged so the KV projection output interleaves K/V per head along the last dimension: [..., k_head0 | v_head0 | k_head1 | v_head1 | ...], each chunk of width hidden_kv // (2*num_kv_heads).

placement_observations.size_descriptor: q: [batch, num_q_heads, seq_len, head_dim]; k/v: [batch, num_kv_heads, seq_len(or head_dim if transposed), head_dim(or seq_len)]
batch=2, num_heads=8, num_kv_heads=8, q_proj shape (2,1,seq_len,q_len), kv_proj shape (2,1,96,kv_len)
placement_observations.source: call_site: memory_config=self.height_sharded_memory_config; inputs reshaped immediately before, kv_proj/q_proj deallocated immediately after (L1-resident transient)
